strategy: Do not shield: universal Shields get stolen off you, and school Shields are stolen and then destroyed, so rely on resist rather than Towers.
Avoid Heal-over-Times, including pet heals, since each one draws a Snow Drift onto the healed wizard.
He resists Ice 80% and takes 50% more from Fire, so bring Fire and skip Ice attacks.
Blade up a Fire hitter and burn him down directly rather than leaning on shields, HoTs, or DoTs.
cheatNotes: Cast any universal Shield and he cheat-casts Steal Ward on whoever received it, taking it for himself.
Cast any school-specific Shield and he steals it and then destroys it outright.
Cast any Heal-over-Time and he answers with Snow Drift on whoever got the heal.
Even pet HoTs trigger the Snow Drift cheat.
When an enemy takes damage from your DoT, he casts Cooldown on his ally.
